reviews.review_title: 🎵 Get in the Groove with Rhythm Time!
reviews.review_description:
Rhythm Time is a refreshing and well-executed rhythm game that stands out from the crowd. Instead of the usual linear track, it introduces a circular play area in front of you — letting you anticipate exactly where the beats will land. The dual-circle mechanic adds variety and really challenges your coordination, as you use both hands to hit notes across two different zones.

Each track is well chosen, offering a solid mix of rock, rap, and pop with just the right song length to keep sessions dynamic and enjoyable. The movements feel natural and in sync with the music. It’s also an excellent warm-up for players wanting to sharpen their hand-eye coordination before tackling rhythm giants like Beat Saber on expert mode.

Fun, precise, and surprisingly addictive — a great addition to any rhythm game fan’s library!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :)

reviews.review_description: There are 3 speeds and I don’t see much of a difference.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. The game speeds up at each difficulty level. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Far better than i expected and  has some pretty decent non licenced tracks but needs content.Track  #3 is my favorite, and there are a pretty decent amount of them to choose from, that is if you are able to.  I  would give this more stars however you can only play as one character (a female cheerleader) and are unable to choose  the tracks to play .  I still have not been able to play them all because you start at one, work your way down , and doesn't save.  Please fix this developers!   This title probably wont appeal to everyone, as I dont think many guys would be admittingly  open about dancing in an all female  cheerleader theme environment but i its a music rhythm game, at a very decent price so I couldnt resist!  Has some pretty good choreography  so its very danceable!

developer_response.body: Fixed the issues you mentioned. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Reeally enjoyed to play and songs!! Need more music! Thanks devs.
